properties.name: Suffolk County DSS - Main / Emergency Services
properties.opening_time: Mon-Fri business hours; after-hours emergency services phone available
properties.short_description: County contact point for people who are homeless or at risk of homelessness; after-hours emergency services phone listed by county.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Address and emergency contact verified from Suffolk County DSS public page

properties.name: Suffolk County DSS - Coram Center / Central Housing
properties.opening_time: Report before 3:00 PM during normal business hours
properties.short_description: DSS center listed for emergency housing access and central housing services.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Address verified from Stony Brook community resource page

properties.name: Suffolk County DSS - Riverhead Center
properties.opening_time: Report before 3:00 PM during normal business hours
properties.short_description: DSS center listed for emergency housing access; emergency and non-emergency contact numbers published.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Address verified from Stony Brook community resource page

properties.name: Suffolk County DSS - South West Center
properties.opening_time: Report before 3:00 PM during normal business hours
properties.short_description: DSS center listed for emergency housing access in western Suffolk.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Address verified from Stony Brook community resource page

properties.name: Suffolk County DSS - Smithtown Center
properties.opening_time: Report before 3:00 PM during normal business hours
properties.short_description: DSS center listed in community resource guide for services including Medicaid/public assistance connection.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Address verified from Stony Brook community resource page

properties.name: Family Service League - The Linkage Center
properties.short_description: TLC offers overnight accommodations, showers, linens, meals, intake, assessment, referral, and crisis intervention to DSS-referred individuals without housing.
properties.coordinate_note: Town-level coordinate because public street address is not listed
properties.verification_status: Program and referral model verified from Family Service League page

properties.name: Family Service League - DASH Crisis Care Center
properties.short_description: Crisis care center that can support people in behavioral health crisis, an important homelessness-risk support service.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Address and crisis-service role verified from FSL/behavioral-health directory sources

properties.name: Maureen's Haven Homeless Outreach
properties.opening_time: Seasonal shelter program; hours vary by site
properties.short_description: East End nonprofit providing homeless outreach and seasonal shelter support; Stony Brook resource page lists Maureen's Haven as a local shelter not through DSS.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Shelter role verified from Stony Brook page; public office address used

properties.name: Pax Christi Hospitality Center
properties.opening_time: Year-round; call first / may need DSS approval
properties.short_description: Local shelter resource listed as year-round for males ages 16+; public address used for mapping.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Shelter type verified from Stony Brook community resource page

properties.name: Ryhan's Center of Hope
properties.opening_time: DSS referral required; after-hours DSS emergency number available
properties.short_description: Provides emergency shelter to Suffolk County homeless families and individuals through contract with Suffolk County DSS.
properties.coordinate_note: County-level coordinate because public street address is not listed
properties.verification_status: Provider role verified from organization website; address not publicly listed

properties.name: Long Island Coalition for the Homeless
properties.short_description: Lead entity addressing homelessness on Long Island; provides direct care, housing-focused case management, helpline, and coordination of referrals.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Program role verified from LICH website

properties.name: HELP Suffolk
properties.opening_time: Food pantry: call first; shelter services through referral
properties.short_description: HELP Suffolk is listed as a food pantry and has historically provided emergency family housing services.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Food pantry address verified from county pantry list; emergency housing provider status supported by Suffolk emergency housing audit context

properties.name: Concern for Independent Living
properties.short_description: Provider of housing and support services; useful as a supportive-housing resource layer rather than a walk-in shelter.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Provider included as a housing/homeless-services organization; verify specific program before public launch

properties.name: Association for Mental Health and Wellness
properties.short_description: Behavioral-health and housing support provider; Suffolk audit identifies AMHW as an emergency housing services contractor.
properties.coordinate_note: Approximate address-level coordinate; re-geocode before final publication
properties.verification_status: Provider role verified from Suffolk Comptroller emergency housing audit; public office address used
